title: Sum of the first n centered hexagonal numbers = n^3
statement_informal: 1 + 7 + 19 + ... (centered hexagonals) sums to a perfect cube n^3.

cost_model.notes: A striking identity: partial sums of centered hexagonals are exactly the cubes.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 1 §1.2.3 — sums and figurate numbers.
